title: Build native-coin buy() via dexe_otc_buyer_buy (dryRun)
notes: Phase B — exercises dexe_otc_buyer_buy native path in dryRun. ZeroAddress sentinel signals native BNB → no ERC20 approve, value=amount. Verifies the single buy() payload is returned with chainId, value, and the proof passed through (empty array for open tier).

successCriteria.check: buy.native == true and buy.preflight is null (no ERC20 read)
buy.steps length == 1 and the only step is a buy() TxPayload with value == amount and chainId == 97
